tools.name: Blender
tools.description: Industry-standard 3D creation suite. Modeling, animation, rendering, simulation, video editing.

tools.name: FreeCAD
tools.description: Parametric 3D CAD modeler for engineering, product design, and architecture.

tools.name: Wings 3D
tools.description: Lightweight subdivision modeler. Great for organic shapes and low-poly work.

tools.name: MeshLab
tools.description: 3D mesh processing. Clean, repair, inspect, convert, and measure meshes.

tools.name: GIMP
tools.description: Full-featured image editor. Photo retouching, compositing, graphic design.

tools.name: Krita
tools.description: Professional digital painting. Brush engines, layer management, animation tools.

tools.name: Paint.NET
tools.description: Fast, intuitive image editor for Windows. Layers, effects, plugins.

tools.name: Photopea
tools.description: Browser-based Photoshop alternative. Opens PSD, XCF, Sketch, XD files.

tools.name: Inkscape
tools.description: Professional vector graphics editor. SVG native. Logos, diagrams, illustrations.

tools.name: Vectr
tools.description: Simple vector editor with real-time collaboration and cross-platform sync.

tools.name: Boxy SVG
tools.description: Modern SVG editor focused on simplicity and web standards.

tools.name: LibreOffice
tools.description: Complete office suite. Writer, Calc, Impress, Draw, Base, Math.

tools.name: OnlyOffice
tools.description: MS Office-compatible suite with real-time collaboration.

tools.name: CryptPad
tools.description: Encrypted collaborative editing. Documents, spreadsheets, presentations.

tools.name: Etherpad
tools.description: Real-time collaborative text editor. Self-hostable. Plugin ecosystem.

tools.name: Kdenlive
tools.description: Non-linear video editor. Multi-track, transitions, effects, titling.

tools.name: Shotcut
tools.description: Cross-platform video editor supporting hundreds of formats via FFmpeg.

tools.name: DaVinci Resolve
tools.description: Professional editing, color grading, VFX, and audio post-production.

tools.name: OpenShot
tools.description: Easy-to-use video editor with drag-and-drop, animation, and effects.

tools.name: Audacity
tools.description: Multi-track audio editor. Recording, mixing, effects, noise reduction.

tools.name: LMMS
tools.description: Digital audio workstation. Synthesizers, beat sequencer, FX chains.

tools.name: Ardour
tools.description: Professional DAW for recording, editing, and mixing. VST plugin support.

tools.name: MuseScore
tools.description: Music notation software. Compose, play back, and print sheet music.

tools.name: VS Code
tools.description: Lightweight but powerful code editor with massive extensions ecosystem.

tools.name: Zed
tools.description: High-performance editor built in Rust. Multiplayer editing, AI integration.

tools.name: Lapce
tools.description: Lightning-fast code editor written in Rust with WASI plugin system.

tools.name: Notepad++
tools.description: Fast text editor with syntax highlighting for 80+ languages.

tools.name: SumatraPDF
tools.description: Blazing fast, minimalist PDF/EPUB/MOBI/CHM reader.

tools.name: Okular
tools.description: Universal document viewer. PDF, EPUB, CHM, XPS, and more.

tools.name: Stirling PDF
tools.description: Self-hosted PDF toolkit. Merge, split, convert, compress, OCR.

tools.name: Aseprite
tools.description: Professional pixel art and animation. Compile from source for free.

tools.name: LibreSprite
tools.description: Free fork of Aseprite. Full pixel art editor with animation support.

tools.name: Piskel
tools.description: Browser-based pixel art editor with animation timeline and export.

tools.name: OBS Studio
tools.description: Industry-standard streaming and recording. Scenes, sources, filters, plugins.

tools.name: HandBrake
tools.description: Video transcoder. Convert between formats, compress, batch process.

tools.name: ShareX
tools.description: Screenshot and screen recording with annotation, OCR, and upload.

tools.name: 7-Zip
tools.description: High compression ratio archiver. 7z, ZIP, GZIP, TAR, and more.

tools.name: KeePassXC
tools.description: Cross-platform password manager. Local vault, browser integration, TOTP.

tools.name: Everything
tools.description: Instant file search. Indexes entire drive in seconds.

tools.name: WinSCP
tools.description: SFTP, SCP, FTP client with GUI. Sync directories, edit remote files.
